text:
Market today: Inflation easing a bit is the main driver, but geopolitical tensions are a lurking risk. Tech/chip names are sensitive to both.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate (-30.59% PnL). SPAL is also showing weakness (-36.78% PnL) and is flagged NEW.

Watch: Monitor the cybersecurity sector for further AI spending commentary.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions and watch for tech sector catalysts.
plays: SOXL: TRIM. Leveraged decay and current losses warrant reducing exposure.
SPAL: TRIM. Leveraged ETF showing significant weakness, consider reducing.
AMD: Consider entry 547.58-547.03, stop 545.95. Scanner setup supports a long bias.
